{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231700438C8EA142318E18B26811"}"},"total":1400},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7558651144550548248","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"真的写的很好，是我看过穿秦小说唯二好看的了。
我们那迷人又早逝的老祖宗，在作者笔下逐渐变成有血有肉的人。
丞相李斯也不再是历史上的政治家，他毒舌 厚脸皮，但又带着真切的情谊。
他改变了历史上许多人的命运，但是自己的命运却是从故事开头就注定了。
那么，再见吧，赵九元。
希望再见的时候，你不必殚精竭虑。可以身体健康，偷得浮生半日闲。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1759887173,"group_id":"7490579264056609854","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1OYVggy5cG7jhrllTMn76U=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/4fa4d5f5a5cf46f28497ba21093fb015~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776791948&x-signature=6xSM6HpdFGOVUcmqj4jPjkuQWgM%3D","user_id":"94040441757","user_name":"吃老虎的兔子z"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"94040441757","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7490579264056609854","book_info":{"abstract":"本书第二部已开，正在连载中٩(๑ᵒ̴̶̷͈᷄ᗨᵒ̴̶̷͈᷅)و
身穿变年轻＋团宠＋无cp＋事业型＋系统＋基建＋萌宠＋一统六国＋改变二世而亡的结局
赵九元刚参加完朋友的汉服聚会，就被老家老爹催促回汉中老家，开车穿过隧道时，竟然误入时空隧道，穿越到了两千年前的秦国不说，还绑定一个满口谎话的系统。
什么？不能改变秦二世而亡的结局就不能回家？
还必须给未来留下文脉种子？
开什么玩笑，以一人之力撼动整个大秦，疯了吧？你凭什么自信我能够做到？
……赵九元独白版……
从进入历史的视野开始，我便在下一盘大棋，所有人都是我棋盘上的棋子，包括我自己……
……我知道，故事的结局还没到终章，我还会再度站在故事的开头。
（本书故事明暗两条线，涉及未来、现代、战国古代，多世界融合）
注意：①本书会恢复女装，以女子身份上朝。②系统是伏笔。③本书没有反派，一切都是利益使然。④无雌竞。⑤主朝堂谋略。⑥嬴政信任无猜忌。⑦本书是绝世小甜饼","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/c792fc05e857ca150a6015fbc0a8646d","author":"楚见辞","author_id":"","book_id":"7490579264056609854","book_name":"身穿大秦：病弱谋士她支棱起来了","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#202838","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":253,"name":"古言脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=253&name=古言脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":5,"name":"古代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=5&name=古代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":388,"name":"女扮男装","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=388&name=女扮男装&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":392,"name":"无CP","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=392&name=无CP&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7490580253572612670","read_count":"11962","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"663075"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.3","serial_count":"294","tags":"古言脑洞,古代言情,系统,穿越,女扮男装,无CP","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/e0e0d2e2fda8aac4aca646d0a137fd9c~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779440443&x-signature=FVEtWGzJe%2FL9P8pshnVwLXHY5cI%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"108142001966","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"335"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231700438C8EA142318E18B26811"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读8小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":14,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":29341,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":6020},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7551429897941664536","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"非常!非常非常非常非常非常非常非常好看!!!作者是少有的能写出女主谋略才华的作者，女主的计谋思想很自然，改变秦朝的策略也很合适，没有一下子就废分封，也没有大力鼓励商业，对于修路时，也不是一下子就说要用水泥，而是根据当时的生产能力选用三合土的方式，一切都根据当时秦朝的实际情况来，真的很好。还有就是在收复六国途中没有说把火药什么的给弄出来，其实这种文我真的不是很喜欢一上来就搞火药，就像作者文里说的，那个时代有着自己的发展节奏，可以适当推进，但没必要一下子步子迈太大，走不稳。很好!"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1758206097,"group_id":"7490579264056609854","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2ikqPTC/uhRGcU3vTgBpCfkASAatN+clvgwpYUjCbRs","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/9f401e23538c4d6fbf1740268357eb9c~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776788460&x-signature=xez%2BkXlzvCp758bG2Cmu7fAl4BI%3D","user_id":"4503194001488446","user_name":"喝个冰阔落叭"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4503194001488446","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1746128002,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn":false,"id":2,"name":"永不书荒","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c704b96a929a7a8b3461ddbf49a8d01","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b93ef223f8131d9ee8e8312f642d9681"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":" 阅读38小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":22,"forwarded_count":1,"listen_duration":68427,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":136977,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":12531},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1758433650,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7565042144154141502","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"希望作者大大越来越好，能继续写和这本小说质量差不多的小说，一定要坚持写作啊[飞吻][飞吻][飞吻]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1761377762,"group_id":"7490579264056609854","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3153045984381400"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7490579264056609854","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"359"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读26小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":6434,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":92773,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7565044557601375038","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"怎么那么好看，一切都很合理，而且作者也很有文化，写的很有内涵。九块钱的形象特别生动，我好喜欢她，她好伟大。其他的历史人物形象也都很饱满，很真实。
好像这本小说本身就是一个平行时空里真正存在的一个可能，只是借由作者的手展示给读者看。
最后结局的时候也好好哭，一切都回归正轨了，实现了一开始的愿望，秦朝发展的越来越好，九元也回家见到家人了，但是她们都又失去了好多好多。你能真实感受到他们之间的感情，友情、亲情，还有好像有但是又不能有的爱情，他们互相成就和改变。
我从来没看过那么好、那么可以称得上是细糠的小说。这是我第一次写长评，但是说的都是我内心的感受，我真的超级超级超级喜欢这本小说。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1761377516,"group_id":"7490579264056609854","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"开心快乐每一天(*^ω^*)","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8IgY4OrsnmRZSMpXd2y3YOM8yGzoLhYyWHu3IPZNl9C","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/5d7b9f5e53ee43a092e0bec69349a899~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776787281&x-signature=dHnqwHl8szZrIeXHEn%2F2%2BO%2BveDk%3D","user_id":"3153045984381400","user_name":"颜晞玉"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3153045984381400","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1708526657,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn":false,"id":2,"name":"永不书荒","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c704b96a929a7a8b3461ddbf49a8d01","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b93ef223f8131d9ee8e8312f642d9681"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7490579264056609854","book_info":{"abstract":"本书第二部已开，正在连载中٩(๑ᵒ̴̶̷͈᷄ᗨᵒ̴̶̷͈᷅)و
